resources.string: Detects which apps are on screen (including split-screen panes) so App-Block can show the block screen when a budgeted app is visible. Reads only which app owns each window; it does not read screen content.
You chose to block this app. Take a breath and go back.
You\'ve used up today\'s time for %1$s. It resets at 4am.
Clock tampering detected. Everything stays blocked until automatic date & time is back on in Settings.
The blocking service died (battery optimization or a crash). Open App-Block to bring it back.
The Accessibility service is switched off, so nothing is blocked. Re-enable it in Settings.
You have 15 minutes to make one change to your limits, then it locks again.
